scripts.build: vite build && npm run copy-manifest && npm run copy-tinymce
scripts.prod: vite build && npm run copy-manifest && npm run copy-tinymce
scripts.production: vite build && npm run copy-manifest && npm run copy-tinymce
scripts.copy-manifest: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('public','build','.vite','manifest.json');const dest=path.join('public','build','manifest.json');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,dest);console.log('Manifest copied to public/build/manifest.json');}else{console.log('Source manifest not found');}"
